name: ai_marketing_claude
description: An AI-powered marketing toolkit offering 15 specialized marketing skills with parallel subagents to audit websites, generate marketing copy, email sequences, ad campaigns, content calendars, competitive intelligence, and client-ready PDF reports.

inputs.name: website_url
inputs.description: URL of the website to be audited or analyzed.

inputs.name: brand_information
inputs.description: Key details about the brand or product for which marketing content is generated.

inputs.name: target_audience
inputs.description: Description of the desired audience segment for marketing activities.

inputs.name: campaign_goals
inputs.description: Objectives and goals intended to be achieved through marketing campaigns.

inputs.name: content_topics
inputs.description: Topics or themes to be covered in generated marketing materials.

inputs.name: email_sequence_parameters
inputs.description: Parameters such as the number of emails, tone, and call-to-action details for email sequences.

inputs.name: competitive_brands
inputs.description: List of competitor brand names or URLs for competitive intelligence gathering.

outputs.name: website_audit_report
outputs.description: Comprehensive audit report of the analyzed website with insights and recommendations.

outputs.name: marketing_copy
outputs.description: Generated persuasive marketing text for ads, emails, or web content.

outputs.name: email_sequence
outputs.description: Series of crafted email messages tailored for marketing campaigns.

outputs.name: ad_campaign_plan
outputs.description: Structured ad campaign details including messaging, targeting, and budget recommendations.

outputs.name: content_calendar
outputs.description: Calendar schedule detailing planned marketing content rollout.

outputs.name: competitive_analysis_report
outputs.description: Insights and analysis of competitor marketing strategies.

outputs.name: client_ready_pdf_report
outputs.description: Consolidated, professional PDF report combining audit and marketing plans for client presentation.

steps: Input website URL and brand details into the system
Run parallel subagents to perform website audit, generate marketing copy, plan email sequences, and analyze competitors
Consolidate outputs such as audit reports, copy, and campaign plans
Generate a content calendar aligned with campaign goals and content topics
Create client-ready PDF reports summarizing all findings and plans
Review and customize generated materials as needed
Deploy marketing campaigns using generated sequences and ad plans
use_cases: Marketing teams auditing client websites and generating comprehensive campaign materials
Small businesses leveraging AI to create email marketing sequences and ad content without dedicated resources
Agencies conducting competitive intelligence to inform client marketing strategies
Content planners developing organized, calendar-driven content strategies
Consultants preparing professional, consolidated reports for clients
patterns: Parallel subagents architecture enabling simultaneous execution of multiple marketing skill modules
Template-driven generation of marketing copy and email sequences
Automated website auditing using AI-driven analysis
Competitive intelligence gathering via data extraction and comparative summarization
Dynamic content calendar generation based on marketing objectives

prompt_templates.name: website_audit_prompt
prompt_templates.template: Perform a detailed audit of the website at {website_url} focusing on SEO, UX, and marketing effectiveness.

prompt_templates.name: marketing_copy_prompt
prompt_templates.template: Generate compelling marketing copy for {brand_information} targeting {target_audience} with the goal of {campaign_goals}.

prompt_templates.name: email_sequence_prompt
prompt_templates.template: Create an email sequence with {email_sequence_parameters.number_of_emails} emails, in a {email_sequence_parameters.tone} tone, including calls to action for {campaign_goals}.

prompt_templates.name: ad_campaign_prompt
prompt_templates.template: Develop an ad campaign plan for {brand_information} focused on {target_audience} aiming to achieve {campaign_goals}.

prompt_templates.name: competitive_intelligence_prompt
prompt_templates.template: Analyze the marketing strategies of competitors: {competitive_brands} and summarize strengths and weaknesses.

prompt_templates.name: content_calendar_prompt
prompt_templates.template: Generate a content calendar for the following topics: {content_topics} aligned with the campaign goals: {campaign_goals}.
